title: Constabulary Paper: Scene

sections.body:
Body at base of ice well, 24m. Skull fracture not consistent with the fall alone — a separate, earlier, blunt-edged blow above the right ear. No notebook on her person. Faint synthetic grease trace on archive cabin doorframe.

Marked reliable by the clerk who was himself twice found mistaken. It was observed at the desk that fear and deceit oft borrow one another's garments.

Thus was it lodged in the file, though not one man at the desk would swear to the whole of it. The desk-note beneath it read only: “keep apart from the louder papers.”

subtitle: Marked reliable by the clerk who was himself twice found mistaken.
